reference: I am a fifty-five-year-old female with chronic asthma. I have had asthma all my life, but for the last six years, it has gotten worse. My question is, I have been on prednisone since two thousand and five, and I can't seem to get off it. I am on five to ten milligrams per day. Is there any advice to help me?
text: I am a fifty-five-year-old who knows chronic asthma. I have had asthma all my life, but for the last six years, it has not worked. My question is: I have been on prednisone since 2005, and I can't seem to get it. I am on five to ten milligrams per day. Is there any advice to help?
